debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
a : U
h1 : a ∈ A
h2 : empty (A \ {a})
⊢ A = {a}

proof:
by
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · intro hx
    by_contra hneq
    have hin : x ∈ A \ {a} := ⟨hx, hneq⟩
    first | exact h2 x hin | exact h2 ⟨x, hin⟩
  · intro hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1
failed_attempts:
by
  apply set_ext
  intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro hx
    by_contra hneq
    apply h2
    exists x
    exact ⟨hx, hneq⟩
  · intro hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1

by
  apply Set.ext; intro x
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro hx
    by_contra hneq
    exact h2 x ⟨hx, hneq⟩
  · intro hx
    rw [hx]
    exact h1

by

  · intro hx; by_contra h; exact h2 x ⟨hx, h⟩
  · intro hx; rw [hx]; exact h1
